name: kube-verdict
description: Anchor-by-render root-cause analysis for Kubernetes incidents — reconstructs the expected state from Helm/GitOps rendered manifests, diffs it against the live cluster, and turns declared-vs-observed drift into a ranked diagnosis with remediation commands, a rollback plan and a confidence score. Runs air-gapped via local Ollama.

interface.shortDescription: GitOps-aware Kubernetes incident RCA: render-vs-live drift → ranked diagnosis + remediation
interface.longDescription: KubeVerdict reconstructs the expected state from Helm/GitOps rendered manifests, compares it with the live cluster, and turns declared-vs-observed drift into evidence-ranked root-cause hypotheses before any LLM explanation. It proposes remediation commands with a rollback plan and a confidence score, and stops at a human approval gate. Runs air-gapped via local Ollama.
interface.defaultPrompt: Investigate crashlooping or OOMKilled pods in a namespace and propose a safe remediation
